info.title: EdgeEver API
info.description: REST API for EdgeEver notebooks, memos, resources, API tokens, and Agent integrations.

post.summary: Create an isolated user workspace (owner only)

patch.summary: Update, disable, or reset a user (owner only)

201.description: Created token; plaintext token is shown once

parameters.name: includeDescendants
parameters.description: Include memos from all descendant notebooks when notebookId is set.

post.description: Soft-deletes active memos, or permanently deletes trashed memos when permanent is true.

delete.description: Permanently deletes all trashed memos and their remaining resource objects.

post.description: Creates a new memo, joins source Markdown with separators, soft-deletes source memos, and re-points resources to the new memo.

patch.description: Use expectedRevision for optimistic concurrency. A mismatch returns revision_conflict.

post.summary: Start a bound memo edit session
post.description: Binds an edit session to the memo id, current revision, current content hash, and authenticated actor.
Uploads an image resource for a memo. Images are stored as provided; server-side compression is disabled.

get.summary: Read a page of Markdown export data
get.description: Returns active memo details and their resource metadata for browser-side Markdown ZIP generation. Requires read:memos and read:resources scopes.

200.description: A page of active memos and related resources

get.summary: Read a page of EdgeEver ZIP recovery data
get.description: Returns active memo details, revision history, and resource metadata for browser-side EdgeEver ZIP generation. The resulting archive also contains human-readable Markdown. Trash is excluded.

200.description: A page of logical backup data

post.summary: Import a batch of notebooks from an EdgeEver ZIP
post.description: Interactive-user-only merge restore. Matching EdgeEver notebook IDs are overwritten.

post.summary: Import a batch of memos from an EdgeEver ZIP
post.description: Interactive-user-only merge restore, including current content and revision history. Matching EdgeEver memo IDs are overwritten.

put.summary: Import one resource from an EdgeEver ZIP
put.description: Interactive-user-only resource import. The multipart metadata field contains the structured EdgeEver ZIP resource record.

post.description: Supports initialize, tools/list, tools/call, notifications/initialized, and batch requests.
